svg.text: CHANGE JUDGE (runs before any production change)
“Does this tuning or migration pass the eval suite? Is a rollback ready?” → PASS: ship · FAIL: hold & fix · no production change without passing evals — always reversible

svg.text: ① Always-on — the control plane watches the fleet 24/7, event-driven, never polling a screen.
② Eval-gated — no change reaches production without passing evals; rollback always ready.
③ Observable — every agent action is monitored, logged, and traceable.
④ Cost-controlled — model tiering + caching + batch keep cost-per-outcome low and transparent.
⑤ Claude-native — eval-gated model migrations keep you on the best model with zero regression.
⑥ The operations layer — runs every elan1 product, solution & build at scale on enterprise1.
